description: Legal document, mentions ziqnei ha-yishmaelim. Deed of authorization of son to represent mother before her two brothers concerning the collection of debt at Efrayim b. Shemarya's court (l. 22r). Written in Tyre, confirmed in Fustat. Dating: ca. 1007–1055 CE, based on Efrayim b. Shemarya's years of activity.
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
